title: dysphania congestiflora
intro: Dysphania congestiflora, also known as Coast Range Blite or Beach Blite, is a species of flowering plant in the amaranth family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dysphania congestiflora include reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, for its medicinal and health benefits.
